bird.name: Ashy storm petrel
bird.summary: The ashy storm petrel (Hydrobates homochroa) is a small, scarce seabird of the storm petrel family Hydrobatidae. It breeds colonially on is…

relations.subject: Ashy storm petrel
relations.evidence: It is threatened by western gull and burrowing owl predation, illumination from fishing boats, introduced predators such as rats and feral cats, and pollution
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: Ashy storm petrel
relations.evidence: It is threatened by western gull and burrowing owl predation, illumination from fishing boats, introduced predators such as rats and feral cats, and pollution
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

relations.subject: Ashy storm petrel
relations.evidence: Future changes to coastal California waters due to global warming could result in warmer, less productive waters, which would mean less food would be available for the petrels
relations.object_summary: 长期升温改变海冰和海洋环境条件。
